case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. VS. MARIA INES LUNA DE JIMENEZ

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DE JIMENEZ, MARIA INES LUNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DE JIMENEZ, MARIA INES LUNA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,700.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-20-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-09-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-20-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $50.92 INTEREST, $100.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO, INC.
